overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban street beneath elevated highways at night. The scene transitions from a busy sidewalk with street vendors and hotel signage through a long covered corridor to an open intersection at Drake Ave, featuring dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards and reflective wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with neon hotel signage

events.description: passing by a street food vendor stall with red neon lighting on the right
approaching the large digital billboard and intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, navigating past pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with glowing red counter and steam rising
pedestrian in white shirt and tie walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large purple neon hotel sign with Japanese text reading vacancy available
street food vendor stall with red glowing counter and steam vent
massive concrete overpass structure with metal beams overhead
vertical neon sign with purple and pink Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet asphalt sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a street vendor with a red neon stall. The purple neon hotel sign dominates the view ahead while pedestrians move in opposing directions. Steam rises from a vent near the food stall as the camera approaches a large digital billboard in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with fluorescent lighting

events.description: turning right into a long covered corridor beneath the highway overpass
transitioning from colorful neon lighting to cooler fluorescent tube lighting

agents.ego_description: turning right into the long covered walkway and continuing straight toward the distant light

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying advertisement with person's face
green neon arrow sign with text IT'S BIG pointing right
linear white fluorescent light fixtures mounted under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a long, covered corridor beneath the highway, leaving the colorful neon signs behind. Fluorescent tube lights illuminate the concrete walkway as a massive digital billboard becomes visible ahead. The space feels more enclosed and industrial compared to the previous open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered pedestrian corridor with industrial scaffolding and food vendors

events.description: approaching brighter area at the end of the corridor with increasing pedestrian density
passing a food stall on the right and approaching the exit to open street

agents.ego_description: walking through the long corridor toward the light at the end, passing by a green-lit food stall

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: metal scaffolding and industrial piping along the right wall
food vendor stall with green neon lighting and counter
green street sign with white text Drake Ave becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Walking through the long covered corridor, the character passes industrial scaffolding and a green-lit food stall on the right. The corridor gradually brightens as the exit approaches, revealing the Drake Ave street sign. Fluorescent lights continue overhead while pedestrians ahead walk toward the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection at Drake Ave with crosswalk and traffic

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open intersection with visible sky
waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
crossing the street at the red and yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for traffic to clear, then crossing Drake Ave while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
white van approaching the intersection from the left

entered.detail: multi-story teal colored building with multiple balconies and windows
red and yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on asphalt
large orange industrial framework structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the character enters the open intersection at Drake Ave, marked by a green street sign. The teal building complex dominates the right side while the character waits for a red sedan and white van to pass before crossing the striped crosswalk. Natural light mixes with neon signage as the elevated highway recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit sidewalk through a sterile industrial corridor and out into a wide urban intersection. It begins on a wet asphalt street beneath an elevated highway, passing a red neon food stall and rising steam as the camera moves toward a dominant purple hotel sign. As the character turns right, the colorful streetscape gives way to a long, enclosed concrete walkway illuminated by cold fluorescent tube lights and industrial scaffolding. The scene then gradually brightens as the camera follows pedestrians toward the exit, passing a green-lit stall before the corridor opens up to reveal the Drake Ave street sign. Finally, the camera emerges into a sprawling intersection dominated by a teal building complex, where the character waits for a red sedan and white van to pass before crossing a striped crosswalk under a mix of natural and neon light.
